whereApplies_fil: Lahat ng accredited government hospitals at ilang private hospitals na voluntary na sumali sa NBB.
whereApplies_en: All accredited government hospitals and select private hospitals that voluntarily joined NBB.
whatsCovered_fil: Lahat ng gastos sa ospital — room and board, operasyon, gamot, laboratory, professional fee — hanggang sa package rate ng PhilHealth. Walang babayaran ang pasyente.
whatsCovered_en: All hospital expenses — room and board, operations, medicines, laboratory, professional fees — up to PhilHealth package rate. Patient pays nothing.
exception_fil: NBB ay hindi mag-aaplika kung: (1) pasyente ang humiling ng private room, (2) private doctor ang hiniling, (3) lumabas ng ospital laban sa rekomendasyon ng doktor.
exception_en: NBB does not apply if: (1) patient requests private room, (2) patient requests private doctor, (3) patient leaves against medical advice.
privateDoctorNote_fil: Kung ang pasyente ay may sariling doktor na gusto niyang gamitin (hindi ang hospital-assigned doctor), maaaring may babayaran sa professional fee kahit NBB member.
privateDoctorNote_en: If the patient insists on using their own doctor (not hospital-assigned), professional fee may still be charged even for NBB members.
